product: Lakeflow jobs system tables are now generally available (GA)
tagline: The lakeflow system tables jobs, job tasks, job run timeline, and job task run timeline are now generally available (GA).
what_it_does: The lakeflow system tables jobs, job tasks, job run timeline, and job task run timeline are now generally available (GA). These tables provide insights into all jobs and job runs in your account. For a reference of these tables, see Jobs system table reference.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The lakeflow system tables jobs, job tasks, job run timeline, and job task run timeline are now generally available (GA). These tables provide insights into all jobs and job runs in your account.

capabilities.title: Be both a metastore admin
capabilities.desc: Be both a metastore admin and an account admin, or

capabilities.title: Have USE and SELECT permissions
capabilities.desc: Have USE and SELECT permissions on the system schemas. See Grant access to system tables.

key_takeaway: The lakeflow system tables jobs, job tasks, job run timeline, and job task run timeline are now generally available (GA).
